steps.title: Focus on shared information
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between the Yukon River and the Rhine River. Relevant notes show that both rivers have rankings among the longest rivers in the world.

steps.title: Exclude single-river details
steps.content: Choice A discusses only the Yukon River. Choice B and Choice C discuss only the Rhine River. None of those choices emphasizes a shared feature of both rivers. The effective response must name a trait both rivers have in common. The answer is D.
